heading: Rates of peacetime death compensation
label: 1142 Rates of peacetime death compensation
text: For the purposes of , the monthly rates of death compensation payable shall be those specified in .section 1141 of this titlesection 1122 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 342 of this title, substituted “1141” for “341” and “1122” for “322”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1974— substituted “those specified in ” for “equal to 80 per centum of the rates prescribed by , adjusted upward or downward to the nearest dollar, counting fifty cents and over as a whole dollar”.Pub. L. 93–295section 322 of this titlesection 322 of this title
